channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: How Philips Hue got the smart home right
item.description: The state of the smart home can be frustrating, because it is just so obvious how things ought to work. You should be able to control everything from everywhere. Your spaces should adapt to what you're doing and how you're feeling. Making your home smart shouldn't require renovating, and the smarts should be mostly invisible. […]

item.title: La première voiture BYD réservée à l’Europe est hybride : le constructeur s’explique sur ce choix inattendu
item.description: Le constructeur chinois BYD nourrit de grandes ambitions sur le marché européen. Jusqu'à présent, les voitures commercialisées par BYD en Europe étaient des modèles conçus en Chine, puis adaptés aux réglementations européennes. Toutefois, le constructeur change de paradigme en lançant la Dolphin G, sa première voiture pensée spécifiquement pour l'Europe. ...

item.title: Less is more with the Oura Ring 5
item.description: If you're reading an Oura Ring 5 review at The Verge, you likely fall into one of two camps: newcomers looking for a smartwatch alternative, or Oura users pondering an upgrade. In the case of the former, this is a great casual health tracker and the best smart ring on the market - but not […]

item.title: Understanding multi-exposure photography: key terms explained, in-camera techniques, what to shoot and more
item.description: I was sceptical at first, but multiple exposure photography is the perfect way to create abstract images that'll make your portfolio pop

item.title: There's a sneaky way to watch the 2026 Wimbledon Men's Final for free — stream Sinner vs Zverev
item.description: We've found a sneaky way to stream the Wimbledon men's final for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: The Nvidia Shield TV is one of my favorite streaming gadgets ever — but the base model is no longer on sale, and may not come back
item.description: Nvidia has confirmed that the Shield TV base model is out of stock, and it doesn't seem as though it's likely to return.

item.title: The correct way to position your router's antennas depends on your home
item.description: Know where to place your router and how to position its antennas should get you better coverage.

item.title: Ce distributeur de croquettes connecté Xiaomi à moins de 80 € nourrit votre animal à votre place
item.description: Le Xiaomi Smart Pet Food Feeder 2 est un distributeur de croquettes intelligent, qui vous permet de nourrir votre boule de poils à distance et en toute sécurité. Actuellement, PC Componentes l'affiche à 79 euros au lieu de 99 euros, prix proposé par Xiaomi.
